General.Name: Taizhou Water Group Co Ltd
General.Description: Taizhou Water Group Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in supplying raw water, municipal water, pipeline direct drinking water, packaged drinking water, and tap water directly to end-users in Mainland China. It is involved in the installation of the water pipelines; centralized water production and supply; and bottled drinking spring water production. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Taizhou, China.
General.Address: No. 308, Yin Quan Road, Taizhou, China, 318020
